metadata.pilot_strategy: Pilots already completed in previous round (pilot_summary.json). This plan defines the new pilot gates for the updated candidate, focusing on rate-distortion theory validation and control calibration. Three new gates: (1) control calibration, (2) CMI estimation feasibility, (3) multi-L0 SAE availability.
metadata.sae_config: Gemma Scope L12 16k residual stream, multiple L0 operating points
metadata.prior_pilot_status: ADVANCE -- both probe quality and first-letter pilots passed. See pilot_summary.json.

first_letter_validation.key_finding: Rate within published range but probe quality low (4/25 pass F1>0.85). Controls need calibration (C1=9.2%, C2=59.5%).
first_letter_validation.action: Improvement needed: 50+ words/letter for better probe quality; investigate control implementation.

probe_quality_city_country.key_finding: 16/29 countries F1>0.85. SAE probes outperform dense probes (0.773 vs 0.617).
probe_quality_city_country.action: Proceed with caution. Exclude countries <5 cities or F1<0.50.

decoder_geometry.key_finding: Conditional cosine + firing rate filter operational.
decoder_geometry.action: De-prioritized in updated candidate (unsupervised pipeline now secondary).

pilot_gates.name: Control Calibration Gate
pilot_gates.pass_criteria: Random control (C1) < 5% AND shuffled control (C2) < 20%. Pilot showed C1=9.2%, C2=59.5% -- both way too high.
pilot_gates.fail_action: C2 > 30%: investigate shuffling implementation. C1 > 5%: check random direction generation. If unfixable after 2 attempts, report as metric limitation and adjust net absorption = gross - control_rate.
pilot_gates.rationale: Controls must be calibrated before interpreting any absorption signal as genuine. The 59.5% shuffled rate suggests either metric threshold is too permissive or the shuffling procedure has an implementation bug.

pilot_gates.name: CMI Estimation Feasibility Gate
pilot_gates.pass_criteria: k-NN MI estimator produces finite, non-negative CMI values for at least 20/25 letters at d'=20 subspace dimension. Variance across bootstrap resamples < 50% of mean.
pilot_gates.fail_action: If >5 letters yield NaN/negative: try alternative MI estimator (binning, MINE). If unstable across resamples: increase corpus size or reduce subspace dimension.
pilot_gates.rationale: The rate-distortion diagnostic is the most novel contribution (8/10). Must verify CMI estimation is numerically feasible before committing to this as primary theoretical framing.

pilot_gates.name: Multi-L0 SAE Availability Gate
pilot_gates.pass_criteria: At least 3 of the 4 target L0 configs ({22, 42, 82, 163}) for Gemma Scope L12 16k load successfully in SAELens.
pilot_gates.fail_action: If only 2 configs available: proceed with reduced L0 range, note limitation. If only 1 config: cannot do multi-L0 decomposition; pivot H2 to cross-config decomposition (width variation instead of L0).
pilot_gates.rationale: Multi-L0 confound decomposition (H2) is primary contribution. Requires multiple operating points for the same architecture/width.

pilot_experiments.name: CMI Estimation Feasibility on 5 Letters
pilot_experiments.pass_criteria: all 5 test letters yield finite positive CMI AND variance < 50% of mean

pilot_experiments.name: Multi-L0 SAE Config Availability
pilot_experiments.pass_criteria: >=3 of 4 configs load successfully in SAELens

pilot_schedule.description: Gate 3 (multi-L0 availability) runs first during setup. Gates 1 and 2 are embedded in their respective full tasks (first_letter_improved and cmi_estimation) and serve as early checkpoints.

contingency.all_gates_pass: Proceed to full experiment plan with high confidence. Rate-distortion theory + cross-domain + confound decomposition as three-pronged study.
contingency.gate_1_fails: Control calibration failed. Adjust thresholds or report net-of-control absorption. May need to shift emphasis from absolute rates to relative rates across domains.
contingency.gate_2_fails: CMI estimation unstable. Try alternative MI estimator. If fundamentally infeasible, pivot to cand_decomposition_reframing (threshold sensitivity + confound decomposition without rate-distortion theory).
contingency.gate_3_fails: Limited L0 configs available. Reduce H2 multi-L0 decomposition scope. Use width variation or cross-layer variation instead of L0 variation.
contingency.gates_1_and_2_fail: Both controls and CMI are problematic. Pivot to cand_decomposition_reframing with strong emphasis on threshold sensitivity, confound decomposition from a metric validation perspective.
contingency.all_gates_fail: Fundamental methodological issues. Re-evaluate whether this research direction is viable for this iteration. Consider pivoting to a different research question entirely.
